movie.title: Rudra Garuda Purana (2025) [Hindi ORG] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: The story delves into the mystery of a bus accident that occurred 25 years ago, claiming the lives of all its passengers. In a shocking twist, the same bus and its passengers reappear years later, sparking an intense investigation. The bus named “17A Kaveri Express” forms the center character in the plot.
